
```{r}
#| label: experiment-plan

knitr::kable(
  EXPERIMENT_PLAN[EXPERIMENT_PLAN$run, ],
  caption = if (exists("cap_experiment_plan")) cap_experiment_plan else "Experiment matrix"
)
```

```{r}
#| label: select-experiments

if (quick_run) {
  selected <- data.frame(
    network_id = c("dod2k_speleothems", "dod2k_speleo_trees", "ntrend_trees"),
    calibration_id = rep("course_split", 3L),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
} else {
  selected <- EXPERIMENT_PLAN[EXPERIMENT_PLAN$run, c("network_id", "calibration_id")]
}

selected$experiment_id <- paste(selected$network_id, selected$calibration_id, sep = "__")
knitr::kable(
  selected,
  caption = if (exists("cap_selected")) cap_selected else "Selected experiments"
)
```

```{r}
#| label: run-cfr
#| cache: true

results <- setNames(vector("list", nrow(selected)), selected$experiment_id)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(selected))) {
  id <- selected$experiment_id[i]
  message("=== ", id, " ===")
  results[[id]] <- run_cfr_experiment(
    network_id = selected$network_id[i],
    calibration_id = selected$calibration_id[i],
    overwrite = overwrite_cfr
  )
}

ok <- vapply(results, function(x) is.null(x$error), logical(1))
if (!any(ok)) {
  stop("All CFR experiments failed.")
}
if (!all(ok)) {
  warning("Some experiments failed: ", paste(names(results)[!ok], collapse = ", "))
}
```
